description: Simple probuyer-like risk rules based on customer-level batch purchasing features.

rules.name: Extreme total quantity
rules.risk_reason: Customer purchased unusually high total quantity.

rules.name: Extreme max invoice quantity
rules.risk_reason: Customer had at least one unusually large basket.

rules.name: High bulk invoice ratio
rules.risk_reason: Large share of customer invoices are bulk-like.

rules.name: High SKU concentration
rules.risk_reason: Large share of quantity comes from one SKU.

rules.name: High cancellation ratio
rules.risk_reason: Customer has unusually high cancellation or return-like behavior.
